results.title: Brian Zimmerman, MD - Chief Medical Information Officer @ Microsoft | MD, FACP, FAAP | LinkedIn
results.snippet: October 16, 2025 - I work closely with internal and external stakeholders, such as product managers, engineers, clinicians, executives, and customers, to ensure that our solutions meet the needs and expectations of the healthcare market. I also lead and support several initiatives and projects that aim to improve the quality, safety, and usability of EHR and HIT systems, such as the EHR build and optimization program, the integration of voice recognition technology with EHR systems, and the development of new features and functionalities.

results.title: Sarah Richardson - This Week Health | LinkedIn
results.snippet: 3 weeks ago - 𝙒𝙚'𝙡𝙡 𝙞𝙢𝙥𝙡𝙚𝙢𝙚𝙣𝙩 𝙨𝙤𝙢𝙚𝙩𝙝𝙞𝙣𝙜 𝙖𝙣𝙙 𝙛𝙞𝙣𝙙 𝙤𝙪𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙖𝙡𝙡𝙮 𝙦𝙪𝙞𝙘𝙠𝙡𝙮 𝙩𝙝𝙖𝙩... 𝙩𝙝𝙧𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙞𝙛𝙛𝙚𝙧𝙚𝙣𝙩 𝙥𝙚𝙤𝙥𝙡𝙚 𝙖𝙧𝙚 𝙪𝙨𝙞𝙣𝙜 𝙞𝙩 𝙞𝙣 𝙫𝙚𝙧𝙮 𝙙𝙞𝙛𝙛𝙚𝙧𝙚𝙣𝙩 𝙬𝙖𝙮𝙨.” This awesome conversation with Veena Jones, CMIO at Sutter Health, really got me thinking even more deeply about the impact of tech on clinical workflows.
